# FASTQ Processing

## Introduction

This notebook implements the FASTQ processing functionality for
BarcodeSeqKit. It includes classes and functions for handling FASTQ
files, extracting barcodes, and sorting reads into appropriate output
files based on barcode detection.

# Conclusion

This notebook implements the FASTQ processing functionality for
BarcodeSeqKit, providing efficient extraction and classification of
barcoded reads from FASTQ files. The implementation uses the efficient
FastqGeneralIterator for parsing FASTQ files and provides flexibility
for handling both single-end and paired-end data.
